text: You showed agency today. Even when conditions changed, you kept looking for the next move available to you.
You can see that outcomes were shared, but your preparation and response still mattered. That's a healthy form of agency.

text: Today your frame was narrow, probably because the day felt heavy. A wider radius of concern often reduces pressure because it reconnects effort to meaning.
